description:
speed: mixed 2-D residual+dense architecture with leaky_relu/ELU/GELU; batch=4, 8x20

Scoring: no regular points; the test is marked passed only when the implementation is at least 5 % faster than the reference (max_slowdown=0.95). Bonus: tier 1 = 3 pts for slowdown <= 0.95 (>=5 % speedup), tier 2 = 7 pts for slowdown <= 0.75 (>=25 % speedup); bonuses are cumulative.
